'''jataya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yole|yole]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-t-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yole|yole]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| jataya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jætæyæth|jætæyæth]] || [[word:jætæyæj|jætæyæj]] || [[word:jætæyæsh|jætæyæsh]] || [[word:jætæyæ|jætæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jatatayath|jatatayath]] || [[word:jatatayaj|jatatayaj]] || [[word:jatatayash|jatatayash]] || [[word:jatataya|jatataya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jatayath|jatayath]] || [[word:jatayaj|jatayaj]] || [[word:jatayash|jatayash]] || [[word:jataya|jataya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jatafyath|jatafyath]] || [[word:jatafyaj|jatafyaj]] || [[word:jatafyash|jatafyash]] || [[word:jatafyaf|jatafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jatayatha|jatayatha]] || [[word:jatayaja|jatayaja]] || [[word:jatayasha|jatayasha]] || [[word:jatayaka|jatayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jatayath|jatayath]] || [[word:jatayaj|jatayaj]] || [[word:jatayash|jatayash]] || [[word:jataya|jataya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jatayathal|jatayathal]] || [[word:jatayajal|jatayajal]] || [[word:jatayashal|jatayashal]] || [[word:jatayakal|jatayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jatayathatha|jatayathatha]] || [[word:jatayajaja|jatayajaja]] || [[word:jatayashasha|jatayashasha]] || [[word:jatayaka|jatayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jatayathan|jatayathan]] || [[word:jatayajan|jatayajan]] || [[word:jatayashan|jatayashan]] || [[word:jatayakan|jatayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jatayathaoro|jatayathaoro]] || [[word:jatayajaoro|jatayajaoro]] || [[word:jatayashaoro|jatayashaoro]] || [[word:jatayakaoro|jatayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7318718}}
